name: Goat Cheese with Sun-Dried Tomatoes and Rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover dried tomato halves with boiling water and let stand 5 minutes.
Drain and chop the tomatoes.
2. Combine chopped tomatoes and the next three ingredients (garlic, canola oil, fresh rosemary).
3. Cover and chill in the refrigerator for up to 4 hours.
4. Slice the baguette thinly and brush the slices with additional oil.
5. Place the sliced baguette on a baking sheet and bake at 350°F for 8 minutes or until lightly toasted.
6. Just before serving, place goat cheese on a plate and top with marinated tomatoes.
7. Serve with baguette rounds and garnish with fresh rosemary sprigs.
